probe1_direct.name: probe1_direct

probe2_allowed_shape.name: probe2_allowed_shape

probe3_chain_bootstrap_unconstrained.name: probe3_chain_bootstrap_unconstrained
probe3_chain_bootstrap_unconstrained.source:
run probe3_chain_bootstrap_unconstrained {
  some a: Actor, c1, c2: Claim, o1, o2: Op |
    o1 != o2
    and o1.by    = a   and o2.by    = a
    and c1.author = a  and c2.author = a
    and o1.using = c1  and o2.using = c2
    and o1.post  = o2.pre
    and a not in o1.pre.hasStanding
    and a     in o2.post.hasStanding
    and kernelAuthorized[o1]
    and kernelAuthorized[o2]
} for 4

probe4_chain_bootstrap_with_independence.name: probe4_chain_bootstrap_with_independence
probe4_chain_bootstrap_with_independence.source:
run probe4_chain_bootstrap_with_independence {
  some a: Actor, c1, c2: Claim, o1, o2: Op |
    o1 != o2
    and o1.by    = a   and o2.by    = a
    and c1.author = a  and c2.author = a
    and o1.using = c1  and o2.using = c2
    and o1.post  = o2.pre
    and a not in o1.pre.hasStanding
    and a     in o2.post.hasStanding
    and kernelAuthorized[o1]
    and kernelAuthorized[o2]
} for 5

probe5_independence_allows_legitimate_gr.name: probe5_independence_allows_legitimate_grant
probe5_independence_allows_legitimate_gr.source:
run probe5_independence_allows_legitimate_grant {
  some a, granter: Actor, o_grant, o_use: Op |
    a != granter
    and o_grant != o_use
    and o_grant.by   = granter
    and o_use.by     = a
    and o_grant.post = o_use.pre
    and a in o_use.pre.hasStanding
    and kernelAuthorized[o_use]
} for 4
